description_long: This is a striking, black, pointed crown-style hat with a dramatic, tall central peak and two smaller, curved side points. The front features a prominent crescent moon emblem, giving it a mystical or ceremonial appearance. The hat is open at the back and sides, forming a rigid, angular frame that would sit atop the head rather than fully enclosing it. Its surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and suggesting a hard, possibly lacquered or plastic material. The structure is thin and lightweight, with no visible padding or lining, and the interior is hollow. The overall design is bold and theatrical, suitable for costume, performance, or symbolic urban use.
description: A glossy black, crown-shaped hat with a tall central peak, two side points, and a crescent moon emblem on the front. Its open, angular frame and reflective surface give it a dramatic, ceremonial look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall central peak, two side points, and a crescent moon emblem prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extreme height of the central peak and the open, angular structure of the hat.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open back and the smooth, continuous curve of the base, with no decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the height and sharpness of the peaks, as well as the open, frame-like construction.
attribute_crown_shape: tall and sharply pointed with angular side peaks
